title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 2 - Predicting (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introductory computer science course that includes a chapter on AI and prediction. The course is available through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with this particular lecture delivered live by instructor Brian Yu on the topic of prediction in AI.
writeup: CS50's Brian Yu teaches Chapter 2 of the course's AI module, focused on prediction and presented as live unedited content. The chapter situates prediction within Harvard's foundational computer science course, available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and Harvard Summer School. Stated concepts include deep learning and conformal prediction.
